title: Poster on humanoid robots
body: "This poster introduces the world of humanoid robots to primary school students. It includes:    facts about humanoids examples of what they can do and possible features advantages and some potential issues with the technology   The poster suggests questions to prompt discussion and invites pupils to get involved in tackling the science and engineering challenges of our times.   If you are you a teacher, student or parent keen for your school to get involved in the project, email us at emtech@go-science.gov.uk.  "
